messages.content: the lowest i could go is 275.0.
i can give you 253.0 and pick it up myself if i am able to test it first.
i'll do 265.0 for the subs or 275 for both
would you accept 260.0 if i pick it up at your location?
i am interested in your Panasonic 32" TV?
hello, are you interested in my project?
would you consider an offer of 90.0?
i could come down to 100.0 and help you with installation.
i can go 97.1 if you pick it up.
92.7, i'll pick it up and deal?
hello! so you're looking for an apartment?
no the Carports, Large Spacious Units, Recreation Area, Pool, Heating
yes, we can schedule a showing
what a cute $1295 Studio Apt in Richmond -walk-in distance to Bart. i see the amount is 1295.0, is ther any room for negotiation?
what condition is this Used high end printer Dell 2130cn?
black, if you are interested i can offer you free shipping
since it's used would you be willing to negotiated a little lower? maybe 210.0?
no can do, 286.0 is the best i could for you partner
220.0, i'll pick it up and deal?
if you can pay 267.0 you have a deal.
how about 225.0? that's about all i can spend.
meet me in the middle at 248.0 and we have a deal
that sounds fair. 248.0 is reasonable, i can do that.
okay. so we have a deal.
is the house still available? i'd like to offer 816.0
woah that's too too low. i can give it to you for 1630.0 its 995 cut off right there
how about 1620.0 a Beautiful 1BR Apartment at a Great Location!?
hmm, still kind of high. how about 995.0?
this isn't a budget rental, i can't go any lower than 1450.0.
i could do 1290.0 if you could waive the deposit.
hi were you interested in the Ideal location in Livermore! Will not last!?
great! do you have any questions?
are any amenities or utilities included?
the lease price is a little high. would you consider 1330.0?
i can't go much lower than 1820.0 that would be way below market for a place like this
i can't do 1440.0. can you do 1640.0?
are you interested in the subwoofer? it's a beauty.
would you consider an offer of 115.0?
i think the lowest i could do would be 165.0
i just don't see that it is worth that. how about 126.0.
you drive a hard bargain. okay then 143.0 it is.
hi! i'm interested in your Futon drawers!
but it is used. how about 76.7?
that is still quite high can we agree on 80.3
ok how about both for 86.7 and you deliver.
hi is the Rosewood Dining Table, 8 chairs, Corner Cabinet still for sale?
how about 600.0 and i'll throw in a free delivery?
i can maybe go down to 518.0
465.0 would be the last im sorry
how about 424.0 for all three boxes?
how about 500.0 and i can include the chair as well.
